blended.narrative: Killington is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
